settings.title: Love the pattern!
settings.text: I love this pattern! It fits like a standard surgeons cap but I can tuck my hair in too. So many people at work have asked where I've gotten this. I'm spreading the word and will definitely be buying more in the future
settings.author: Happy customer

settings.title: Wonderful scrub cap!
settings.text: Wonderful scrub cap. Great quality and value. Had to choose a pug pattern! Thank you
settings.author: Pug approved 🐾

settings.title: Fantastic quality hats!
settings.text: Fantastic quality hats with excellent customer care. The whole department is wearing them! Would highly recommend and I will definitely order future scrub caps from this business.
settings.author: The whole team

settings.title: Amazing customer service!
settings.text: Sarah is great, not only did she keep me updated on the delivery of the bag, but she also helped me out with questions when I asked her what I may need starting my new job as a VCA! Amazing customer service. Love the bag, it's adorable.
settings.author: New VCA student

settings.heading: Our customers say
settings.subtext: Don't just take our word for it — hear from our happy customers!
